final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Xiaohongshu (小红书) cover image for a platform announcement (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "高级杂志感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Kinfolk editorial design, 时尚芭莎 (Harper's Bazaar China) cover heritage, Cereal magazine minimalist luxury; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use diagonal composition
Subject: must include the platform announcement context as focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: must use high-contrast accent colors
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2", "Lovart"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve diagonal composition, high-contrast accent color palette
Avoid:
